Kasper Spindler ← Back

2026 Danish Folketing Election TikTok Dashboard

I collected 4,943 videos uploaded by 195 accounts from the last 6 months, with data collected on the 22nd-23rd of March, 2026, covering the lead-up to and announcement of the Danish election on February 26, 2026. Read more about the project on GitHub.

02 — Video-level Engagement

Views & likes per video over time

Each dot is a single video. Select parties and/or individual accounts. Click a dot to open the video. Dashed lines mark the local elections on November 18, 2025 and the election announcement on February 26, 2026.
